column1: # mapping_set_description: "Canonical MediaIngredientMech → ingredient-ontology mappings (CHEBI + FOODON; UBERON/ENVO when populated). One row per mapped MIM ingredient record. Per-row object_source distinguishes ontologies. Predicate is skos:exactMatch by default; narrowMatch/broadMatch/closeMatch where residual-P2.5 triage found a specificity or symmetry difference, or where mapping_quality != EXACT_MATCH. The `source` extension column records the upstream origin (MIM evidence + kg-microbe source pipeline, CHEBI only)."
